caption: A man with fair skin and short hair is seated in a recording studio or podcasting environment. He is wearing a grey t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. He is positioned behind a large computer monitor and speaks into a professional microphone attached to a boom arm. In the background, black acoustic foam panels are visible on the wall. Beside the man is a black office chair and a small piece of equipment with a silver metallic component. Throughout the sequence, the man maintains a consistent position, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks, showing a range of motion in his mouth and jaw. The overall lighting is soft, and there are some white papers visible on the desk surface in front of him. No text or logos are legible in the scene.
